why_it_matters: Imputation can leak information if done before splitting
Needed for imbalance or clustered data
Shows whether ML improves on simple approach
Required when the claim involves distribution shift or stable prediction
Required for cross-region cross-industry cross-policy or new-period claims
Separates robust predictive features from environment-specific correlations
Explains where the model may fail under new regimes
Prediction features are not causal effects
